steps.title: Identify the rate of change/intercept
steps.content: The equation $s = 50 + 4t$ is in the form $s = b + mt$. The constant $b = 50$ is the value of $s$ when $t = 0$.

steps.title: Interpret the coefficient
steps.content: $t = 0$ corresponds to the moment the car began to accelerate, so 50 is the initial speed in mi/h. That matches choice D — D is correct.
